equipment.name: Mazak I-600 5-Axis Machining
equipment.description: Our Mazak I-600 5-axis machining centers handle complex contoured geometry — impellers, turbine components, and multi-face aerospace brackets — in a single setup. Five-axis simultaneous motion eliminates repositioning error and holds ±0.01mm on critical features, making the Mazak I-600 our go-to for aerospace and medical parts that demand positional accuracy across multiple datums.

equipment.name: DMG MORI 60EVO 5-Axis Machining
equipment.description: The DMG MORI 60EVO complements our 5-axis capacity with a 600 × 550 × 500mm work envelope, ideal for medium-sized precision housings and structural components. Its rigid construction and high-speed spindle deliver excellent surface finish on aluminum and titanium, reducing the need for secondary polishing.

equipment.name: FANUC & Brother High-Speed 3-Axis Milling
equipment.description: For fast-turnaround precision parts and higher-volume runs, our FANUC a-D14MIA and Brother TC-S2DZ high-speed milling machines deliver rapid cycle times without sacrificing accuracy. These machines excel at small-to-medium aluminum and steel components — electronics enclosures, connectors, and brackets — where throughput and repeatability matter. With 70 Renishaw in-machine probes across the fleet, dimensions are verified during machining, not just after.

cards.title: CNC Milling
cards.description: 3-axis to 5-axis CNC milling on DMG MORI, Mazak, and Hermle. Tolerances to ±0.005mm on aluminum, steel, titanium, and engineering plastics.

cards.title: CNC Turning
cards.description: Swiss-type and conventional CNC lathes for shafts, bushings, connectors, and precision turned parts. Live tooling for milled features.

cards.title: 5-Axis Machining
cards.description: Simultaneous 5-axis on DMG MORI DMU 50 and Mazak Variaxis. Impellers, turbine blades, complex aerospace and medical geometries in one setup.

cards.title: Die Casting
cards.description: High-pressure die casting in aluminum (A380, ADC12) and zinc alloys. From prototype tooling to high-volume production runs.

cards.title: Investment Casting
cards.description: Lost-wax investment casting in stainless steel, carbon steel, and copper alloys. Near-net shapes with excellent surface finish.

cards.title: Forging
cards.description: Open-die and closed-die forging for high-strength structural components. Grain flow optimization for fatigue-critical parts.

cards.title: Sheet Metal
cards.description: Laser cutting, CNC bending, welding, and finishing. Enclosures, brackets, chassis, and structural sheet metal assemblies.

cards.title: Stamping
cards.description: Progressive die and compound die stamping. High-volume contacts, brackets, shields, and electrical components.

cards.title: Surface Finishing
cards.description: Anodizing (Type II/III), powder coating, electroplating, passivation, polishing, sandblasting, and laser engraving — full in-house capability.

cards.title: Assembly
cards.description: Sub-assembly and full product assembly with bonded, fastened, and welded joining. Functional testing before shipment.

cards.title: Production Runs
cards.description: Low- to mid-volume production with consistent quality and on-time delivery. PPAP documentation available for automotive and medical.

cards.title: Precision Inspection
cards.description: Zeiss and Hexagon CMM inspection, optical measurement, surface roughness verification. Full First Article Inspection reports.

cards.title: Aerospace Parts
cards.description: ISO9001 & IATF16949 certified manufacturing for flight-critical components. We deliver precision parts for commercial aviation, defense, and space applications with rigorous quality standards.

cards.title: Liquid Cooling Parts
cards.description: High-precision thermal management components for data centers, EVs, and high-performance computing. Expert in complex cooling channel machining and heat sink manufacturing.

cards.title: Medical Devices
cards.description: Precision manufacturing for surgical instruments, implants, and diagnostic equipment. Cleanroom-compatible processes with full traceability documentation.

cards.title: Electronics
cards.description: Precision enclosures, heat sinks, and mechanical components for consumer electronics, telecommunications, and semiconductor equipment manufacturing.

cards.title: Industrial Equipment
cards.description: Heavy-duty components for manufacturing machinery, pumps, valves, and industrial automation systems. Built for durability and performance in demanding environments.

cards.title: Robotics & Automation
cards.description: High-precision components for robotic arms, actuators, and automated systems. Supporting the next generation of manufacturing and service robotics.

general.question: What file formats do you accept?
general.answer: We accept all major CAD formats including STEP (.STEP/.STP), IGES (.IGES/.IGS), STL, SolidWorks (.SLDPRT), Parasolid (.X_T), ACIS (.SAT), AutoCAD (.DWG/.DXF), PDF drawings, and ZIP archives with multiple files. If you have a different format, please contact us.

general.question: What is your typical lead time?
general.answer: Standard lead time is 7–10 business days. Expedited service is available at 10–15 days, and extended timelines (15–25 days) offer the most competitive pricing. Complex parts may require additional time.

general.question: Is there a minimum order quantity?
general.answer: No minimum order required. We handle everything from single prototypes to production runs of 100,000+ parts. Our pricing is competitive at any volume.

technical.question: What tolerances can you achieve?
technical.answer: Standard tolerances are ±0.005" (0.127mm). Precision tolerances to ±0.005mm (±0.0002") are available for critical features. Tighter tolerances may be possible depending on geometry.

technical.question: What materials do you work with?
technical.answer: We machine 50+ materials including aluminum alloys, stainless steel, steel, titanium, brass, copper, engineering plastics (Delrin, PEEK, Ultem, Nylon), and exotic alloys (Inconel, Hastelloy).

technical.question: What certifications do you hold?
technical.answer: We are ISO9001 and IATF16949 certified. We provide complete quality documentation including inspection reports, material certifications, and certificates of conformance.

ordering.question: Do you offer finishing services?
ordering.answer: Yes, we offer anodizing (Type II & III), powder coating, plating, passivation, bead blasting, electropolishing, and more. All finishing is done in-house for quality control.

ordering.question: Do you ship internationally?
ordering.answer: Yes, we ship worldwide. We have experience with international shipping and can handle export documentation. DHL, FedEx, and UPS options are available.

cases.title: Titanium Turbine Component
cases.description: An aerospace OEM required complex titanium components for a new turbine design. The parts featured thin walls, tight tolerances, and demanding surface finish requirements.
cases.challenge: Titanium machining with ±0.005mm tolerances and Ra 16 μin surface finish
cases.solution: 5-axis simultaneous machining with specialized tooling and coolant strategies

cases.title: Surgical Instrument Components
cases.description: A medical device company needed high-volume production of stainless steel surgical instrument components with full traceability and documentation.
cases.challenge: 316L stainless with mirror finish and complete lot traceability
cases.solution: Automated production cells with integrated inspection and barcode tracking

cases.title: Liquid Cooling Heat Sink
cases.description: A data center equipment manufacturer required high-performance liquid cooling heat sinks with complex internal channels for server cooling applications.
cases.challenge: Complex internal cooling channels with leak-proof brazed assembly
cases.solution: Multi-piece CNC machining with vacuum brazing and 100% pressure testing

cases.title: Robotic Arm Joint Assembly
cases.description: A robotics startup needed precision aluminum components for their new collaborative robot arm, with fast iteration cycles during development.
cases.challenge: Rapid prototyping with design iterations and smooth transition to production
cases.solution: Agile manufacturing with DFM feedback and scalable production processes

electroplating.title: Zinc Plating
electroplating.description: Electrochemical process that deposits a protective zinc layer on steel and iron parts, providing excellent corrosion resistance through sacrificial protection.
electroplating.features:
Excellent corrosion resistance
Cost-effective protection
Various finishes: clear, yellow, black
RoHS compliant options available

electroplating.title: Nickel Plating
electroplating.description: Creates a hard, lustrous coating that provides excellent wear resistance and decorative appeal. Available in bright, satin, and electroless variants.
electroplating.features:
High wear resistance
Attractive bright or satin finish
Good corrosion protection
Excellent base for other coatings

electroplating.title: Chrome Plating
electroplating.description: Deposits a hard chromium layer providing superior hardness, excellent wear resistance, and a brilliant decorative finish with low friction coefficient.
electroplating.features:
Extremely high hardness (HV 800-1000)
Superior wear resistance
Brilliant decorative appearance
Low coefficient of friction
electroplating.applications: Hydraulic cylinders, molds, decorative trim, tools

electroplating.title: Copper Plating
electroplating.description: Deposits a copper layer that provides excellent electrical conductivity, often used as a base layer for subsequent plating or for its conductive properties.
electroplating.features:
Excellent electrical conductivity
Good heat conductivity
Ideal undercoat for multi-layer plating
Improves adhesion of top coats
electroplating.applications: Electronics, EMI shielding, decorative base layer

chemical-treatment.title: Blackening / Black Oxide
chemical-treatment.description: Chemical conversion process that produces a black magnetite (Fe3O4) layer on steel and iron parts, providing rust prevention and aesthetic appeal.
chemical-treatment.features:
Rust prevention for ferrous metals
Minimal dimensional change
Attractive matte black finish
Reduces light reflection

chemical-treatment.title: Phosphating
chemical-treatment.description: Creates a crystalline phosphate conversion coating that enhances paint adhesion, provides moderate corrosion protection, and improves lubricity.
chemical-treatment.features:
Excellent paint adhesion
Corrosion protection
Improved lubricant retention
Types: zinc, manganese, iron phosphate

chemical-treatment.title: Passivation
chemical-treatment.description: Chemical treatment for stainless steel that removes free iron and enhances the natural chromium oxide layer, maximizing corrosion resistance.
chemical-treatment.features:
Enhances corrosion resistance
Removes surface contaminants
No dimensional change
ASTM A967 / AMS2700 compliant
chemical-treatment.applications: Medical devices, food equipment, aerospace parts

chemical-treatment.title: Electroless Nickel Plating
chemical-treatment.description: Autocatalytic chemical process that deposits uniform nickel-phosphorus alloy without external electrical current, ideal for complex geometries.
chemical-treatment.features:
Uniform thickness on complex shapes
Excellent corrosion resistance
No edge buildup
Can plate non-conductive substrates
chemical-treatment.applications: Valves, pumps, electronics, oil & gas equipment

anodizing.title: Type II Anodizing (Decorative)
anodizing.description: Standard sulfuric acid anodizing that creates a porous oxide layer suitable for dyeing. Provides good corrosion resistance and aesthetic appeal.
anodizing.features:
Thickness: 8-25μm
Wide range of colors available
Good corrosion resistance
Moderate wear resistance

anodizing.title: Type III Anodizing (Hard Coat)
anodizing.description: Hard anodizing process that produces a much thicker, harder, and more wear-resistant oxide layer for demanding applications.
anodizing.features:
Thickness: 25-100μm
Superior hardness (60-70 HRC equivalent)
Excellent wear resistance
Natural gray-black color

heat-treatment.title: Carburizing
heat-treatment.description: Diffuses carbon into the surface of low-carbon steel at high temperature, creating a hard, wear-resistant case while maintaining a tough, ductile core.
heat-treatment.features:
Case depth: 0.5-2.0mm typical
Surface hardness: 58-62 HRC
Excellent fatigue resistance
Maintains core toughness

heat-treatment.title: Nitriding
heat-treatment.description: Diffuses nitrogen into the surface at lower temperatures than carburizing, creating extremely hard surface layer with excellent wear and fatigue resistance.
heat-treatment.features:
Surface hardness: 65-70 HRC equivalent
Minimal distortion (low temperature)
No quenching required
Excellent corrosion resistance

heat-treatment.title: Induction Hardening
heat-treatment.description: Rapid localized heat treatment using high-frequency electromagnetic induction, followed by quenching to harden specific surface areas while minimizing distortion.
heat-treatment.features:
Precise, localized hardening
Fast process cycle
Minimal distortion
Selective area treatment

mechanical.title: Polishing
mechanical.description: Progressive abrasive process to achieve mirror-like surface finishes with extremely low roughness values. Includes mechanical, chemical, and electropolishing methods.
mechanical.features:
Mirror finish (Ra < 0.1μm possible)
Manual or automated processes
Electropolishing available
Removes surface imperfections
mechanical.applications: Medical devices, optics, decorative parts, molds

mechanical.title: Sandblasting / Bead Blasting
mechanical.description: High-pressure abrasive media treatment to create uniform matte textures, remove burrs, clean surfaces, and prepare for subsequent finishing processes.
mechanical.features:
Uniform matte finish
Effective deburring
Surface preparation
Various grit sizes available

mechanical.title: Brushing / Hairline Finish
mechanical.description: Creates directional linear texture (hairline pattern) on metal surfaces using abrasive belts or brushes, providing distinctive metallic appearance.
mechanical.features:
Distinctive linear texture
Hides fingerprints and scratches
Various grain patterns
Professional metallic appearance

marking-printing.title: Laser Engraving
marking-printing.description: Uses focused laser beam to ablate material surface, creating permanent high-precision marks. Non-contact process ideal for delicate parts and high-volume production.
marking-printing.features:
High precision marking
Permanent, wear-resistant
No contact with workpiece
Fast cycle time for batch production
Variable depth control
marking-printing.applications: Logos, serial numbers, QR codes, button markings, traceability

marking-printing.title: Screen Printing (Silk Screen)
marking-printing.description: Transfers ink through a fine mesh screen onto the workpiece surface. Cost-effective for large batches with vibrant colors and good ink coverage.
marking-printing.features:
Cost-effective for high volumes
Vibrant colors available
Multi-color printing possible
Thick ink layer, good coverage
On-site capability at our facility
marking-printing.applications: Control panels, button text, decorative patterns, labels

marking-printing.title: Pad Printing
marking-printing.description: Indirect offset printing using silicone pad to transfer ink from etched plate to irregular or curved surfaces not suitable for screen printing.
marking-printing.features:
Prints on curved surfaces
Fine detail reproduction
Multi-color capability
Handles complex geometries

other-specialty.title: Dacromet
other-specialty.description: Chrome-free, environmentally friendly anti-corrosion coating using zinc and aluminum flakes in an inorganic binder. Provides excellent corrosion protection without hexavalent chromium.
other-specialty.features:
Chrome-free, RoHS compliant
Excellent corrosion resistance
No hydrogen embrittlement
Heat resistant to 300°C
Environmentally friendly
other-specialty.applications: Automotive fasteners, brake components, wind turbine bolts

other-specialty.title: Teflon / PTFE Coating
other-specialty.description: Fluoropolymer coating providing extremely low friction coefficient, chemical resistance, and non-stick properties for demanding applications.
other-specialty.features:
Lowest friction coefficient
Non-stick surface
Chemical resistance
Wide temperature range

other-specialty.title: Chromate Conversion
other-specialty.description: Chemical treatment for aluminum that provides corrosion protection and improves paint adhesion. Available in clear (RoHS) and yellow/iridescent versions.
other-specialty.features:
Corrosion protection for aluminum
Excellent paint adhesion
Conductive surface maintained
RoHS compliant options
